summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TARIC AI B2B SaaS application with major B2B feature updates. Backend APIs working excellently (98.4% success). All new B2B features verified: team management, organization stats, compliance alerts, client reference tracking. Landing page enhanced with B2B messaging, problems section, official sources, and pricing plans. Frontend UI B2B structure confirmed through visual testing.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 when no authorization token provided
minor_bugs.impact: Endpoint is properly protected, just different status code

passed_tests: Backend health endpoints (2/2 working)
User registration with organization creation (B2B feature)
User authentication APIs (login with JWT tokens)
Organization statistics endpoint - NEW B2B feature (total_searches, searches_this_month, team_members, saved_operations)
Team management endpoints - NEW B2B features:
- Get team members with roles (admin, operator, viewer)
- Invite team member with email notification
- Remove team member (admin only)
Regulatory alerts endpoint - NEW B2B feature (anti-dumping, sanctions, restrictions)
TARIC search with AI and B2B enhancements:
- GPT-5.2 AI integration working (classified olive oil to 1509102000)
- Compliance alerts in search results (4 alerts: sanitary, restriction, antidumping)
- Client reference field tracking - NEW B2B feature (OP-2024-TEST-001)
- Official sources integration (TARIC UE, AEAT, MAPA, EUR-Lex)
Search history with client reference and team member attribution
Search result CRUD operations
Landing page B2B messaging and structure:
- Hero section with 'PLATAFORMA B2B PARA AGENCIAS DE ADUANAS'
- 'Agencias de aduanas e importadores' targeting
- Official sources trust badges (TARIC UE, AEAT, MAPA)
- Navigation menu (SOLUCIONES, FUENTES OFICIALES, PRECIOS)
- CTA buttons (SOLICITAR DEMO, VER SOLUCIONES)
- Problems section 'PROBLEMAS QUE RESOLVEMOS' - NEW
- Official sources section '100% FUENTES OFICIALES' - NEW
- Pricing section 'PLANES B2B' - NEW
Registration form B2B structure:
- Company field 'EMPRESA (OPCIONAL)' for organization creation
- B2B branding 'Empezar a clasificar con IA'
- Proper field validation and structure
